use_cases: Full-screen landing page hero sections with animated shader backgrounds
SaaS product marketing pages with call-to-action overlays
Creative portfolio or media website headers
Modern web app onboarding screens with animated backgrounds
ai_summary: A visually striking hero component featuring an animated warp shader background with swirling distortion effects in cyan and teal tones. The hero overlays glass-morphism styled buttons with hover scale effects on a responsive centered layout. Perfect for modern landing pages and marketing sections requiring immersive animated backgrounds.
